creator: peter.thoenen@protonmail.com
text:
Update to latest release.

diff -ruN tor-devel.orig/Makefile tor-devel/Makefile
--- tor-devel.orig/Makefile	Mon Oct 30 10:05:18 2006
+++ tor-devel/Makefile	Mon Oct 30 10:05:26 2006
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	tor
-PORTVERSION=	0.1.2.2
+PORTVERSION=	0.1.2.3
 CATEGORIES=	security net
 MASTER_SITES=	http://tor.eff.org/dist/ \
 		http://mirror.onionland.org/dist/

--- tor-devel.orig/distinfo	Mon Oct 30 10:05:18 2006
+++ tor-devel/distinfo	Mon Oct 30 10:05:32 2006

-SIZE (tor-0.1.2.2-alpha.tar.gz) = 955886
+MD5 (tor-0.1.2.3-alpha.tar.gz) = fc3b587af65d7b8e04d6baa13a44c3eb
